name: Salmon Turnovers/Puffs
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter or margarine and olive oil together and set aside.
2. Mix the cheeses, salmon, and garlic in a bowl.
3. Stack three sheets of fillo dough together with the butter mixture between each sheet.
4. Cut into six strips.
5. Place a small tablespoon of filling at the end of each strip.
6. Diagonally roll each strip, folding over itself.
7. Brush with additional butter.
8. Bake until golden brown at 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).
